content:
MODULE: cosmos.mcp.mcp_manager
FILE: cosmos/mcp/mcp_manager.py (261 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos MCP Manager
======================

Manages MCP server connections and tool discovery.

CLASSES:
- MCPTool: An MCP tool definition.
- MCPServer: An MCP server configuration.
- MCPManager: Manages MCP server lifecycle and tool discovery.

Features:
- Start/stop MCP ser
  Methods: async def start_server(self, name: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def stop_server(self, name: str)
  Methods: async def call_tool(self, tool_name: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def list_tools(self) -> List[str]
  Methods: def get_tool(self, name: str) -> Optional[MCPTool]
  Methods: def add_server(self, name: str, command: str, args: List[str]=None, env: Dict[str, str]=None)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_mcp_manager() -> MCPManager
